_note: All prices are illustrative ranges. Actual quotes require on-site diagnosis by a licensed technician.

standard_service_call.description: Covers technician travel and initial diagnosis. Waived if repair is booked same visit.

after_hours_surcharge.description: Emergency dispatch surcharge added on top of standard diagnostic fee.

disclaimer: Final pricing depends on parts availability, job complexity, and technician assessment. Only a licensed technician can provide a firm quote after inspection.
